findings.evidence: PR lines 153-177 prove injective/surjective and call `MulEquiv.ofBijective`; Mathlib provides `QuotientGroup.congr` at `mathlib/Mathlib/GroupTheory/QuotientGroup/Defs.lean:392-413`, `MulEquiv.subgroupCongr` at `mathlib/Mathlib/Algebra/Group/Subgroup/Map.lean:525-534`, `Subgroup.topEquiv` at `mathlib/Mathlib/Algebra/Group/Subgroup/Lattice.lean:126`, and `Subgroup.normalizer_eq_top` at `mathlib/Mathlib/Algebra/Group/Subgroup/Basic.lean:365-367`.
findings.fix: Define the equivalence via `QuotientGroup.congr` using `(MulEquiv.subgroupCongr (_root_.Subgroup.normalizer_eq_top (H := H))).trans Subgroup.topEquiv`, then keep only the local simp lemma if needed.
findings.issue: `normalizerQuotientEquivQuotientOfNormal` proves bijectivity of the subtype-induced quotient map manually, creating a parallel normal-case quotient equivalence.

summary: The named quotient itself is new enough for the roadmap, but the normal-case equivalence is rebuilding Mathlib’s quotient-congruence API instead of using it.
